variables.input: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == "Media" | fields json.companyName | dedup json.companyName

fetch bizevents 
| filter json.companyName == $CompanyName
| fields json.journeyType | dedup json.journeyType
fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | fields json.stepName | dedup json.stepName

fetch bizevents
| fields json.serviceName, json.companyName, json.journeyType
| summarize count(),by:{json.companyName, json.journeyType, json.serviceName}
| filter json.companyName == $CompanyName 
| filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType)
| dedup json.serviceName
| fields json.serviceName = lower(json.serviceName)
| filter isNotNull(json.serviceName)

smartscapeNodes PROCESS
| lookup [smartscapeNodes SERVICE | fields id, name], sourceField:name, lookupField:name, prefix:"svc."
| lookup [timeseries cpu = avg(dt.process.cpu.usage), by:{dt.smartscape.process}], sourceField:id, lookupField:dt.smartscape.process, fields:{cpu}
| filter isNotNull(cpu)
| fieldsAdd LowerService = lower(process.metadata[DYNATRACE_CLUSTER_ID])
| filter in(LowerService, $Service)
| fields id
| dedup id

0.content:
# Retail
## Click and Collect - Business Observability Dashboard

**Industry:** Click and Collect | **Dashboard Type:** AI-Generated Bespoke Analytics
**Data Signals Detected:** 🔧 Services

1.content:
## 🔄 Customer Journey Flow

**1. OrderPlacement** (Acquisition) **→** **2. SlotSelection** (FulfilmentPreparation) **→** **3. PaymentAndConfirmation** (Purchase) **→** **4. OrderRoutingToStore** (Fulfilment) **→** **5. PickingAndPackingAtStore** (Fulfilment) **→** **6. CustomerArrivalAndCollection** (PostPurchase)

---
*End-to-end journey visualization with step-by-step metrics*

2.title: 📊 Journey Step Metrics
2.query:
fetch bizevents 
| filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" 
| filter json.companyName == $CompanyName 
| filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType 
| summarize 
    OrdersInStep = count(), 
    SuccessRate = round((toDouble(countIf(isNull(additionalfields.hasError) or additionalfields.hasError == false)) / toDouble(count())) * 100, decimals:2),
    AvgTimeInStep = avg(additionalfields.processingTime),
    ErrorsInStep = countIf(additionalfields.hasError == true),
    ErrorRate = round((toDouble(countIf(additionalfields.hasError == true)) / toDouble(count())) * 100, decimals:2), 
    by: {json.stepName} 
| sort OrdersInStep desc

3.query: data record(a="Overall Journey Performance - All Steps")

4.title: 📈 Total Journey Volume
4.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | summarize TotalEvents = count()

5.title: ✅ Journey Success Rate
5.query:
fetch bizevents 
| filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" 
| filter json.companyName == $CompanyName 
| filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType 
| summarize total = count(), successful = countIf(isNull(additionalfields.hasError) or additionalfields.hasError == false) 
| fieldsAdd success_rate = round((toDouble(successful) / toDouble(total)) * 100, decimals:2)

6.title: 💰 Total Revenue
6.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType or $JourneyType == "*" | summarize revenue = sum(additionalfields.orderTotal)

7.title: ❌ Total Errors
7.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType or $JourneyType == "*" | summarize errors = countIf(additionalfields.hasError == true)

8.title: 📈 Volume Over Time
8.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | makeTimeseries successful = countIf(isNull(additionalfields.hasError) or additionalfields.hasError == false), failed = countIf(additionalfields.hasError == true), bins:30

9.title: 📊 Events by Step
9.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType or $JourneyType == "*" | summarize count = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort count desc | limit 10

10.query: data record(a="Filtered View - By Selected Step")

11.title: 💼 Journey Events (Filtered)
11.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType or $JourneyType == "*" | filter in(json.stepName, $Step) | summarize total = count()

12.title: 💰 Revenue (Filtered)
12.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType or $JourneyType == "*" | filter in(json.stepName, $Step) | summarize revenue = sum(additionalfields.orderTotal)

42.title: 🚨 Active Davis Problems
42.query:
fetch dt.davis.problems
| filter event.status == "ACTIVE"
| fields display_id, title, affected_entity_ids, event.start, event.status, management_zone
| sort event.start desc
| limit 10

43.title: 📋 Recent Log Errors
43.query:
fetch logs, from:now()-1h
| filter loglevel == "ERROR" or loglevel == "WARN"
| fields timestamp, loglevel, content, dt.entity.service
| fieldsAdd serviceName = entityName(dt.entity.service)
| sort timestamp desc
| limit 20
